Name: Anima
Description: After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 0.5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 100 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas get 1 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.

Name: Arbiter
Description: Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

Name: Dark Star
Description: Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies based on units active

Name: Bulwark
Description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield an 20% Attack Speed.

Name: Space Groove
Description: Groovians can enter the Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.

Name: Mecha
Description: Mecha units transform into their Ultimate Form, upgrading their ability and gaining 60% bonus Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait

Name: Meeple
Description: Meeple units attract Meeps that empower their abilities. Field more Meeple units and star them up to see more Meeps appear

Name: Stargazer
Description: Stargazers chart a different constellation each game, creating a hex pattern on your board that empowers allies standing in those hexes

Name: Timebreaker
Description: When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core

Name: Bastion
Description: Your team gains Armor and Magic Resist. Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat

Name: Brawler
Description: Your team gains bonus Health. Brawlers gain more

Name: Challenger
Description: Your team gains 10% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.5 seconds.

Name: Shepherd
Description: Using the Bond of the Stars, summon Bia and Bayin through Shepherds. More star levels increases Bia and Bayin's power

Name: Voyager
Description: Gain a shield at the start of combat. At higher breakpoints the shield lasts longer

Name: Vanguard
Description: Vanguards gain 5% Durability while Shielded. Combat start and 50% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for 10 seconds.

Name: Rogue
Description: Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

Name: Sniper
Description: Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.

Name: Replicator
Description: Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

Name: Marauder
Description: Your team gains 5% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health).

Name: Fateweaver
Description: Innate: Fateweavers have Precision. Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.

Name: Conduit
Description: Innate: Conduits gain 20% additional Mana from all sources. Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Channelers.

Name: Redeemer
Description: For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains 2%/3%/4% Attack Speed, and 2/3/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

Name: Psionic
Description: Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

Name: Primordian
Description: Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

Name: Party Animal
Description:
Party Animal
Once per combat, after falling below 45% Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, Blitzcrank enters The Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

Name: Oracle
Description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

Name: N.O.V.A
Description: 6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions. At 5, gain a Striker selector — the chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.

Name: Factory New
Description: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

Name: Dark Lady
Description: Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

Name: Commander
Description: Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

Name: Galaxy Hunter
Description: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

Name: Gun Goddess
Description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

Name: Divine Duelist
Description: You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

Name: Doomer
Description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

Name: Eradicator
Description: Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.
